findings.description: B1-B10 jobs had no retry logic — a transient store failure would silently drop the daily computation.
findings.fix: Added _exponential_backoff decorator with max_retries=3 and base_delay=1s (backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s).

findings.description: Job failures emitted no artifact — silent failure was possible with no recovery path.
findings.fix: Added _run_with_failure_artifact: on retry exhaustion, emits a job_failure_artifact with status=dead_letter.

findings.description: No schema versioning strategy for artifact_type fields — future schema changes could break queries silently.
findings.fix: artifact_type values are constants in each job method; changes require explicit code update.

findings.description: C9 (supersession chain index) could loop on cycles — no cycle detection in the chain-length traversal.
findings.fix: Added visited set in build_artifact_supersession_chain_index to break on repeated IDs.

findings.description: run_all_daily_jobs had no error isolation — one job failure would abort subsequent jobs.
findings.fix: Wrapped each job call in try/except; failures are recorded in results as {job, error} entries.

findings.description: B6 (supersession audit) counted orphans by checking new_artifact_id is None, but None vs missing key are different.
findings.fix: Used not r.get('new_artifact_id') to catch both None and missing key.
